metadata.description: Workflow pipelines, product exploration, project scaffolding, Flutter tooling, and ASO optimization for Claude Code.

plugins.name: nextc-core
plugins.description: Development workflow pipelines — clarify, feature-dev, team-feature-dev, bug-fix, cleanup, update-docs.

plugins.name: nextc-product
plugins.description: Product exploration — raw idea to validated proposal with market research and collision insights.

plugins.name: nextc-project-kickoff
plugins.description: Project scaffolding from proposal — Flutter and Unity projects with deps and architectural blueprints for /feature-dev.

plugins.name: nextc-flutter
plugins.description: Flutter build and localization — APK/IPA builds and full l10n pipeline.

plugins.name: nextc-aso
plugins.description: App Store Optimization pipeline — multi-agent system for keywords, metadata, creatives, and tracking.

plugins.name: nextc-ecc
plugins.description: Core agents and quality tools — planner, architect, reviewers, session management, verification, safety. Migrated from Everything Claude Code.

plugins.name: nextc-claude-toolbox
plugins.description: Utility toolkit — validation and quality checks against Claude Code specs and repo conventions.
